books.title: Midsummer Manor Mystery
books.author: Jane Ashworth
books.description: A charming mystery set in a Victorian manor where secrets unravel over tea and biscuits.

books.title: Tea & Alibis
books.author: Margaret Chen
books.description: A tea shop owner discovers her knitting circle member is not who she seems.

books.title: Secrets of the Seaside
books.author: Patricia Walsh
books.description: A woman returns to her hometown and uncovers dark secrets buried for decades.

books.title: A Summer in Provence
books.author: Sophie Laurent
books.description: An American artist finds love and herself in the lavender fields of southern France.

books.title: The Last Train Home
books.author: Michael O'Brien
books.description: Two former lovers reconnect on a cross-country train journey and rediscover what they lost.

books.title: Echoes of Tomorrow
books.author: Dr. Alex Rivera
books.description: In 2157, a scientist discovers evidence that the future is trying to communicate with the past.

books.title: Nebula Rising
books.author: James Chen
books.description: A crew of misfits must navigate an uncharted nebula to save humanity from extinction.

books.title: The Dragon's Daughter
books.author: Amanda Price
books.description: A young girl discovers she's the last heir to a dragon kingdom and must reclaim her throne.

books.title: The Enchanted Forest
books.author: Lucy Williams
books.description: A group of children stumble upon an ancient forest where magic is real and friendship is tested.

books.title: Lessons From My Father
books.author: David Thompson
books.description: A man reflects on his relationship with his father and the unexpected lessons learned too late.

books.title: Unraveled: My Journey Back
books.author: Sarah Mitchell
books.description: A woman's honest account of overcoming addiction and rebuilding her life from scratch.

books.title: The History of Forgotten Kings
books.author: Prof. Richard Harris
books.description: An in-depth exploration of lesser-known historical figures who changed the course of nations.

books.title: Politics & Power
books.author: Elizabeth Brown
books.description: A sharp analysis of how power shapes politics and how citizens can reclaim their voice.

books.title: Mindfulness in Daily Life
books.author: Dr. Jennifer Park
books.description: Simple, science-backed practices to bring mindfulness into every moment of your day.

books.title: Blood of the Phoenix
books.author: Victor Kane
books.description: In a dark fantasy world, an unlikely hero discovers she holds the power to destroy an empire.

books.title: The Midnight Library
books.author: Matt Haig
books.description: A woman in a library between life and death gets to explore the lives she could have lived.

books.title: The Quiet Corner
books.author: Helen Santos
books.description: A retired teacher finds unexpected connection and meaning in a small coastal town.

books.title: Laughter in the Rain
books.author: Carlos Rodriguez
books.description: A collection of humorous essays about love, family, and the absurdities of modern life.

books.title: Wings of Change
books.author: Dr. Monica Lee
books.description: A guide to embracing change, overcoming fear, and building the life you truly want.

books.title: The Cookbook Chronicles
books.author: Antonio Forte
books.description: A chef's personal stories woven between recipes that have shaped his life and family.

books.title: Daughter of Smoke and Bone
books.author: Erin Morgan
books.description: A girl caught between two worlds discovers a love that transcends magic and mortality.
